---
title: "verify_hud.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\harness\verify_hud.py"
loc: 5
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.42
style_score: 9.33
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 5.29
---

## Intent
The `verify_hud.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
